summary: Phase 5 Enhancement 'Call History' testing complete - All 20 backend tests pass (100%), all frontend features verified. New features: Call History page at /call-history showing past calls with duration, participants, timestamps, and one-tap redial. Seeded call logs (3 entries) display correctly with video/audio icons, outgoing/incoming/missed labels, and green redial buttons.
critical_code_review_comments: GET /api/calls/history correctly filters by user's participant ID and last 30 days
Call logs properly hydrate participant_details, caller, and target fields from users collection
call_logs collection has proper indexes (participants + started_at, call_id unique)
CallHistoryView correctly displays call type icons (video=blue, audio=orange)
Missed calls show name in red with 'Missed' label
Redial button opens VideoCallOverlay with correct target user
Sidebar has 'Call History' nav item between Walkie Talkie and Apps
seed_data_creation: 3 call logs seeded for admin user: (1) video outgoing 15min, (2) audio incoming 3min, (3) video missed
context_for_next_testing_agent: Phase 5 Enhancement complete. Call History feature fully verified: (1) Backend - GET /api/calls/history returns call logs for current user (last 30 days), sorted by started_at desc, with hydrated participant_details/caller/target. (2) Frontend - CallHistoryView at /call-history shows heading 'Call History' + 'Last 30 days' badge, call items with avatar, call type icon (video=blue, audio=orange), direction (outgoing/incoming/missed), duration, time ago, and green redial button. Missed calls show name in red. Redial opens VideoCallOverlay. (3) Navigation - 'Call History' in sidebar between Walkie Talkie and Apps, 'Calls' icon in dock with green gradient. (4) Regression - Login, Tables, Calendar, Settings, Walkie all still work.

backend_call_history.endpoint: GET /api/calls/history returns list of call logs
backend_call_history.fields: call_id, type, created_by, participants, started_at, status, duration_seconds, participant_details, caller, target
backend_call_history.sorting: Sorted by started_at descending (most recent first)
backend_call_history.hydration: participant_details, caller, target hydrated from users collection
backend_call_history.filtering: Filters by user's participant ID and last 30 days

frontend_call_history.heading: 'Call History' h1 heading present
frontend_call_history.call_items: 3 call history items displayed with data-testid='call-history-item-{call_id}'
frontend_call_history.avatar: Each call item has avatar with initials and color
frontend_call_history.call_type_icon: Video calls have blue icon, audio calls have orange icon
frontend_call_history.missed_styling: Missed calls show name in red with 'Missed' label
frontend_call_history.redial_button: Green redial button with phone icon, opens VideoCallOverlay on click

navigation.sidebar: 'Call History' nav item present with PhoneCall icon, between Walkie Talkie and Apps
navigation.dock: 'Calls' dock item present with green gradient

regression.active_calls: GET /api/calls/active returns empty list (no active calls)
regression.tables: GET /api/tables returns list, table navigation works
regression.pages: Portal, Walkie, Calendar, Apps, Settings pages all load correctly

mocked_apis.note: Call logs are real MongoDB documents, no mocking
